channel.title: Java on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Arrans github.io

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: xpipe-io/xpipe
item.description: Access your entire server infrastructure from your local desktop

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: apache/cloudstack
item.description: Apache CloudStack is an opensource Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) cloud computing platform

item.title: aeron-io/simple-binary-encoding
item.description: Simple Binary Encoding (SBE) - High Performance Message Codec

item.title: sismics/docs
item.description: Lightweight document management system packed with all the features you can expect from big expensive solutions

item.title: Peergos/Peergos
item.description: A p2p, secure file storage, social network and application protocol

item.title: AndroidIDEOfficial/AndroidIDE
item.description: AndroidIDE is an IDE for Android to develop full featured Android apps.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: jberkel/sms-backup-plus
item.description: Backup Android SMS, MMS and call log to Gmail / Gcal / IMAP

item.title: antlafarge/jdownloader
item.description: Docker JDownloader 2 headless image (multi-arch) with automatic update.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)
